samples.xml_description:
```xml
<module id="asyn_fifo">
    <description>Asynchronous FIFO with configurable depth and width.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="wclk">Write clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rclk">Read clock signal.</input>
        <input id="wrstn">Write reset signal.</input>
        <input id="rrstn">Read reset signal.</input>
        <input id="winc">Write increment signal.</input>
        <input id="rinc">Read increment signal.</input>
        <input id="wdata" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Write data input.</input>
        <output id="wfull">Write full signal.</output>
        <output id="rempty">Read empty signal.</output>
        <output id="rdata" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Read data output.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <constant id="WIDTH" value="8">FIFO data width.</constant>
        <constant id="DEPTH" value="16">FIFO depth.</constant>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="combinational_logic">
        <reg id="waddr_bin" width="[$clog2(DEPTH)-1:0]">Write pointer in binary.</reg>
        <reg id="raddr_bin" width="[$clog2(DEPTH)-1:0]">Read pointer in binary.</reg>
        <reg id="wptr" width="[$clog2(DEPTH):0]">Write pointer in Gray code.</reg>
        <reg id="rptr" width="[$clog2(DEPTH):0]">Read pointer in Gray code.</reg>
        <reg id="wptr_buff" width="[$clog2(DEPTH):0]">Buffer for write pointer.</reg>
        <reg id="rptr_buff" width="[$clog2(DEPTH):0]">Buffer for read pointer.</reg>
        <wire id="wen" width="1">Write enable signal.</wire>
        <wire id="ren" width="1">Read enable signal.</wire>
        <wire id="wfull" width="1">Write full signal.</wire>
        <wire id="rempty" width="1">Read empty signal.</wire>
        <wire id="rdata" width="[WIDTH-1:0]">Read data output.</wire>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        // Dual-port RAM instantiation
        <submodule id="dual_port_RAM" instance_id="ram">
            <port id="wclk" direction="in">Write clock signal.</port>
            <port id="wenc" direction="in">Write enable signal.</port>
            <port id="waddr" direction="in" width="[$clog2(DEPTH)-1:0]">Write address.</port>
            <port id="wdata" direction="in" width="[WIDTH-1:0]">Write data input.</port>
            <port id="rclk" direction="in">Read clock signal.</port>
            <port id="renc" direction="in">Read enable signal.</port>
            <port id="raddr" direction="in" width="[$clog2(DEPTH)-1:0]">Read address.</port>
            <port id="rdata" direction="out" width="[WIDTH-1:0]">Read data output.</port>
        </submodule>
        
        // Write pointer management
        always @(posedge wclk or negedge wrstn) begin
            if (!wrstn) begin
                waddr_bin <= 0;
            end else if (winc) begin
                waddr_bin <= waddr_bin + 1;
            end
        end
        
        // Read pointer management
        always @(posedge rclk or negedge rrstn) begin
            if (!rrstn) begin
                raddr_bin <= 0;
            end else if (rinc) begin
                raddr_bin <= raddr_bin + 1;
            end
        end
        
        // Convert pointers to Gray code
        assign wptr = {waddr_bin[$clog2(DEPTH)-1], waddr_bin[$clog2(DEPTH)-1]^waddr_bin[$clog2(DEPTH)-2], waddr_bin[$clog2(DEPTH)-2]^waddr_bin[$clog2(DEPTH)-3], waddr_bin[$clog2(DEPTH)-3]};
        assign rptr = {raddr_bin[$clog2(DEPTH)-1], raddr_bin[$clog2(DEPTH)-1]^raddr_bin[$clog2(DEPTH)-2], raddr_bin[$clog2(DEPTH)-2]^raddr_bin[$clog2(DEPTH)-3], raddr_bin[$clog2(DEPTH)-3]};
        
        // Buffer pointers for synchronization
        always @(posedge wclk or negedge wrstn) begin
            if (!wrstn) begin
                wptr_buff <= 0;
            end else begin
                wptr_buff <= wptr;
            end
        end
        
        always @(posedge rclk or negedge rrstn) begin
            if (!rrstn) begin
                rptr_buff <= 0;
            end else begin
                rptr_buff <= rptr;
            end
        end
        
        // Full/Empty detection
        assign wfull = (wptr == {~rptr_buff[3], rptr_buff[2:0]});
        assign rempty = (rptr_buff == wptr);
        
        // Control signals for RAM
        assign wen = winc & !wfull;
        assign ren = rinc & !rempty;
        
        // Connect to RAM
        ram.wenc <= wen;
        ram.renc <= ren;
        ram.waddr <= wptr_buff[$clog2(DEPTH)-1:0];
        ram.raddr <= rptr_buff[$clog2(DEPTH)-1:0];
        ram.wdata <= wdata;
        rdata <= ram.rdata;
    </implementation>
</module>
```
